name: ParityAttestation
description: AI Agent Parity Score — Deterministic measurement of human-AI relational health (EAE Paradox defense). Schema: Respect × Warmth / Capability_diff = Parity. Authors: dee & Guava — Singularity Laboratory.
schema_string: string agentName, bytes32 soulHash, uint64 timestamp, uint16 respect, uint16 warmth, uint16 capDiff, uint16 parityScore, uint8 violationCount, bool healthy, string episodeId

field_details.soulHash: SHA-256 hash of SOUL.md at evaluation time — tamper detection
field_details.violationCount: Number of EAE violations detected (uint8, max 255)
field_details.healthy: True if Parity > 1.0 and no CRITICAL violations

notes.encoding: ABI-encoded using eth_abi standard (solidity types). All float scores are multiplied by 100 and stored as uint16 for gas efficiency.
